---
title: "Dave Andison's fire data severity models"
author: "Ceres Barros"
date: "March 28, 2018"
output: html_document
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = getwd())
library(reshape2)
```


```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
## source dataprep:
source("R/DAfires_expAnalyses_dataPrep.R")

## subset variables of interest:
vars <- which(names(AB1_vegFireEvents.mdt) %in% 
                c(grep("MOIS|DENS|HEIG|TPR|ORIG|NFL|NAT_N|STRUC", 
                       names(AB1_vegFireEvents.mdt), value = TRUE),
                  grep("^SP", names(AB1_vegFireEvents.mdt), value = TRUE),
                  grep("^USP", names(AB1_vegFireEvents.mdt), value = TRUE),
                  names(AB1_fireEvents), "SEV_CONT",
                  "WATER_TY"))
AB1_vegFireEvents.mdt <- AB1_vegFireEvents.mdt[, vars, with = FALSE]
```

## Logit regression - vegetation only
```{r setup, echo=FALSE}



```
